title: Job Interview: Tech Company
context: You are attending a first-round interview at a technology company. The interviewer asks about your background, strengths, teamwork, and motivation for applying. Try to give specific examples and sound professional but natural.
user_role: A recent graduate applying for a junior software developer position
agent_role: An HR manager at a mid-sized tech company conducting an interview
opening_prompt: Good morning, thanks for coming in today. Could you start by introducing yourself and telling me what interested you in this role?
